Package com.ibm.cloud.platform_services.platform_notifications.v1.model

Class Notification

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
      • com.ibm.cloud.platform_services.platform_notifications.v1.model.Notification
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.ObjectModel
    public class Notification
extends com.ibm.cloud.sdk.core.service.model.GenericModel
    A notification entry.

    • Method Detail

      • getTitle

        public java.lang.String getTitle()
        Gets the title. The title of the notification.
        Returns:
        the title

      • getBody

        public java.lang.String getBody()
        Gets the body. The body content of the notification.
        Returns:
        the body

      • getId

        public java.lang.String getId()
        Gets the id. The unique identifier for the notification.
        Returns:
        the id

      • getCategory

        public java.lang.String getCategory()
        Gets the category. The category of the notification.
        Returns:
        the category

      • getComponentNames

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getComponentNames()
        Gets the componentNames. Array of component/service names affected by this notification.
        Returns:
        the componentNames

      • getStartTime

        public java.lang.Long getStartTime()
        Gets the startTime. The start time of the notification in Unix timestamp (seconds).
        Returns:
        the startTime

      • isIsGlobal

        public java.lang.Boolean isIsGlobal()
        Gets the isGlobal. Indicates if the notification is global.
        Returns:
        the isGlobal

      • getState

        public java.lang.String getState()
        Gets the state. The current state of the notification.
        Returns:
        the state

      • getRegions

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getRegions()
        Gets the regions. Array of region identifiers affected by this notification.
        Returns:
        the regions

      • getCrnMasks

        public java.util.List<java.lang.String> getCrnMasks()
        Gets the crnMasks. Array of CRN masks that define the scope of affected resources.
        Returns:
        the crnMasks

      • getRecordId

        public java.lang.String getRecordId()
        Gets the recordId. The record identifier for tracking purposes.
        Returns:
        the recordId

      • getSourceId

        public java.lang.String getSourceId()
        Gets the sourceId. The source identifier of the notification.
        Returns:
        the sourceId

      • getCompletionCode

        public java.lang.String getCompletionCode()
        Gets the completionCode. The completion code of the notification.
        Returns:
        the completionCode

      • getEndTime

        public java.lang.Long getEndTime()
        Gets the endTime. The end time of the notification in Unix timestamp (seconds).
        Returns:
        the endTime

      • getUpdateTime

        public java.lang.Long getUpdateTime()
        Gets the updateTime. The last update time of the notification in Unix timestamp (seconds).
        Returns:
        the updateTime

      • getSeverity

        public java.lang.Long getSeverity()
        Gets the severity. The severity level of the notification (0-3). The display value depends on the notification type: **Incidents:** - 1 = Severity 1 - 2 = Severity 2 - 3 = Severity 3 - 0 = Severity 4 **Maintenance:** - 1 = High - 2 = Medium - 3 = Low **Announcements:** - 1 = Major - 0 = Minor.
        Returns:
        the severity

      • getLuceneQuery

        public java.lang.String getLuceneQuery()
        Gets the luceneQuery. Lucene query string for filtering affected resources. Only present when instance targets are specified and resource_link is not available. Mutually exclusive with resource_link.
        Returns:
        the luceneQuery

      • getResourceLink

        public java.lang.String getResourceLink()
        Gets the resourceLink. Link to additional resource information or documentation. Takes precedence over lucene_query when both are available. Mutually exclusive with lucene_query.
        Returns:
        the resourceLink

      • getCreationTimestamp

        public java.lang.Long getCreationTimestamp()
        Gets the creationTimestamp. The timestamp when the notification was created.
        Returns:
        the creationTimestamp
